author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered: Pattern fusion pass with two pattern detectors:
1. fuse_linear_activation — detects Linear→Activation (Relu/Gelu/Silu/Sigmoid/Tanh) and replaces with FusedLinearActivation node
2. fuse_attention_pattern — detects Matmul→Scale→Softmax→Matmul (SDPA) and replaces with FusedAttention node
Both run in pattern_fuse() before elementwise fusion in the optimizer pipeline. New IrOpKind variants: FusedLinearActivation, FusedAttention. 224 JIT tests pass.
